exact_failure_cause.details: debug_status() had been indented under _to_float() instead of under MarketStreamClient, so GLOBAL_MARKET_STREAM.debug_status() did not exist and the handler path crashed.

important_runtime_diagnosis: The stream runtime is alive and connected, and messages are arriving, but the current parser expects dict-shaped messages while the live stream delivered a list-shaped payload, causing 'list' object has no attribute 'get' before any state_hub update.
next_tiny_fix_if_requested: Handle list-shaped market stream messages in core/market_stream.py before extracting event fields.
